description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean geometric lines and a flat roof. The structure is composed of several interlocking rectangular volumes in shades of white, gray, and brown, creating a visually dynamic facade. A prominent driveway leads to a garage, while a paved walkway provides access to the main entrance. The property is bordered by a green lawn and a cluster of large, naturalistic rocks, adding organic contrast to the angular architecture. Windows are placed asymmetrically, with some large panes and others more discreet, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The overall impression is of a spacious, upscale residence with a focus on simplicity and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with interlocking rectangular volumes, asymmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard with rocks and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, garage, and landscaped rocks on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the layered volumes, paved walkway, and the green lawn extending behind the rocks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, with minimal window openings and the green lawn visible to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the green lawn, rock cluster, and the house's flat roof and geometric forms.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimal steps, and a paved walkway leading to a simple modern door.
